intro: Anotis finlaysoniana, commonly known as Chaihu, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Chaihu include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Chaihu include sesquiterpenes, phenolic compounds, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
